notes: Landlord and tenant should conduct a condition inspection at move-in and move-out.
The inspection report must be signed by both parties.
A copy must be provided to the tenant within a reasonable time.

citations.statute: Residential Tenancy Act, SBC 2002, c 78, s 17(1)
citations.excerpt: A landlord and tenant must inspect the rental unit together at the beginning and end of the tenancy.
